parse.title: Sheen
parse.wikitext:
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
|goldefficiency =
|similaritems = 
|notes =
{{Spellblade info}}
|strategy = 
|trivia = 
* The search term 'jimmy neutron' being valid in the shop references {{f|jimmyneutron|Sheen Estevez}} from the ''{{w|Jimmy Neutron}}'' animated series.
* The proc effect of '''Sheen''' causes the champion's weapon or hands glow red, using the same visual effects as pre-rework {{cis|Nunu|variant=old2}} {{cci|Blood Boil.png|Nunu/History#Previous_Abilities|Blood Boil}}.
[[File:Freljord Crest icon.png|link=Freljord#Trivia|100px|center]]
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
Sheen screenshot.png|Item VFX
Sheen old screenshot.png|Old Item VFX
</gallery>
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.01]]
* Now builds into {{ii|Dusk and Dawn}} and {{ii|Essence Reaver}}.

;[[V25.15]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Spellblade primed VFX and buff icon on the HUD are no longer incorrectly removed when attacking a plant.
** ''[This did not affect gameplay: the buff itself would not be consumed, and would last for the proper duration.]''

;[[V14.10]]
* No longer builds into {{ii|Essence Reaver}}.

;[[V14.4]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Now is properly displayed in the Ability Haste section of the shop.

;[[V14.3]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|900}} from {{g|1000}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|650}} from {{g|750}}.

;[[V14.1]]
* Item type changed to Epic from Basic.
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Glowing Mote}} + {{g|750}} = {{g|1000}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{g|700}}.
* Ability haste increased to 10 from 0.
* No longer builds into {{ii|Divine Sunderer}}.
* Now limits the user to 1 {{sbc|Spellblade}} item.

;[[V12.22]]
* Now builds into {{ii|Iceborn Gauntlet}}.

;[[V11.24]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Spellblade no longer interferes with {{cai|Fracture|Skarner}} cooldown reduction.

;[[V11.11]]
* Tier changed to Basic from Epic.

;[[V10.25]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a bug where it was possible to reset the cooldown of another item if you swapped the location of it with a freshly activated '''Sheen''' in your inventory.

;[[V10.24]]
* Updated icon.

;[[V10.23]]
* Updated icon.
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Cost:}} {{g|700}}.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spellblade:}} After using an ability, your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as|100% '''base''' AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage on-hit}} ({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, begins after using the empowered attack).
** {{sbc|Builds Into:}} {{ii|Divine Sunderer}}, {{ii|Essence Reaver}}, {{ii|Lich Bane}}, {{ii|Trinity Force}}.
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Sapphire Crystal}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|1050}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 250 mana, 10% cooldown reduction.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spellblade:}} After using an ability, your next basic attack within 10 seconds deals {{as|100% '''base''' AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage on-hit}} ({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown, begins after using the empowered attack).
** {{sbc|Builds Into:}} {{ii|Iceborn Gauntlet}}, {{ii|Lich Bane}}, {{ii|Trinity Force}}.

;[[V10.4]]
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} '''Sheen''' is now granted upon initiating a cast time, rather than upon completing it.

;[[V9.14#July 22nd Hotfix|V9.14]] - July 22nd Hotfix
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer grant an additional stack towards {{ri|Electrocute}} or {{ri|Phase Rush}}.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} {{ci|Corki}} has been added as an exception to consider the '''bonus''' damage part of his attack damage for his {{ai|I|Corki}}.
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} {{cai|E|Gangplank}} and other abilities that convert the damage (i.e {{cai|Q|Camille}}, {{cai|I|Galio}}) have also been added as exceptions.

;[[V9.14]]
* {{sbc|Undocumented:}} '''Bonus''' damage is no longer considered part of the user's attack damage for abilities such as ({{ai|W|Xayah}},{{ai|I|Ashe}},{{ai|Q|Camille}} etc..).

;[[V8.14]]
* Spellblade VFX updated.

;[[V5.22]]
* {{sbc|New recipe:}} {{ii|Sapphire Crystal}} + {{g|700}} = {{g|1050}}
** {{sbc|Old recipe:}} {{ii|Sapphire Crystal}} + {{ii|Amplifying Tome}} + {{g|365}} = {{g|1200}}
* Ability power reduced to 0 from 25.
* Cooldown reduction increased to 10% from 0%.
* Mana increased to 250 from 200.

;[[V4.13]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Now correctly lists the Spellblade passive as having a {{fd|1.5}} second cooldown.

;[[V3.04]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|1200}} from {{g|1260}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|365}} from {{g|425}}.

;[[V1.0.0.152]]
* Mana reduced to 200 from 250.
* Added to recipe for {{ii|Iceborn Gauntlet}}.

;[[V1.0.0.146]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Now displays its cooldown on the item itself rather than with a buff.

;[[V1.0.0.101]]
* Base AD ratio increased to {{as|100% base AD}} from {{as|80% base AD}}.

;[[V1.0.0.100]]
* "Reservoir" system has been removed. {{ii|Sheen}} will now strictly respect the cooldown time between procs. The cooldown has been reduced to 2 second delays between procs from 3 seconds.

;[[V1.0.0.75]]
* Base AD ratio reduced to {{as|80% base AD}} from {{as|100% base AD}}.

;[[V1.0.0.32]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Fixed a visual bug.

;[[V0.8.22.115]]
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Now has an internal cooldown of 3 seconds (but now works with all spells including {{ai|Lay Waste|Karthus}} and {{ai|Hate Spike|Evelynn}}).

;[[June 26, 2009 Patch]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|275}} from {{g|250}}.

;[[May 15, 2009 Patch]]
* Ability power reduced to 25 from 30.
* Mana reduced to 250 from 275.
* Recoded to make it unable to crit.

;Alpha
* {{ii|Sheen}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Sapphire Crystal}} + {{ii|Amplifying Tome}} + {{g|?}} = {{g|?}}
** +30 ability power
** +275 mana
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Spellblade:}} After using an ability, your next basic attack (on-hit) deals {{as|100% base AD}} '''bonus''' physical damage ({{fd|1.5}} second cooldown).
}}
